list.name: variant
list.label: Eval Variant
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT variant FROM analytics.search_eval_results ORDER BY variant

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfHour(ts) AS time, variant, avg(ndcg10) AS avg_ndcg FROM analytics.search_eval_results WHERE variant IN ($variant) AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY time, variant ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfHour(ts) AS time, variant, avg(mrr) AS avg_mrr FROM analytics.search_eval_results WHERE variant IN ($variant) AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY time, variant ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfHour(ts) AS time, variant, avg(map10) AS avg_map FROM analytics.search_eval_results WHERE variant IN ($variant) AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY time, variant ORDER BY time
SELECT count(DISTINCT query) AS queries FROM analytics.search_eval_results WHERE variant IN ($variant) AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
SELECT count(DISTINCT (query, product_id)) AS judgments FROM analytics.search_judgments
SELECT query, ndcg10, mrr, map10 FROM analytics.search_eval_results WHERE variant IN ($variant) AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY ndcg10 ASC LIMIT 10
